query:
SELECT ec.id as erpCompanyId, ec.companyCode, ec.companyName,
  COUNT(c.id) as customerCount
FROM erp_companies ec
LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.erpCompanyId = ec.id
GROUP BY ec.id, ec.companyCode, ec.companyName
LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2Wfg8FxM46VuY92.2046134b715b --database 5QtmwQJEy7EFv8QJHVh9i8 --execute

  COUNT(c.id) as customerCount

LEFT JOIN customers c ON c.erpCompanyId = ec.id
